plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Git and GitHub workflow skills — commits, branches, pull requests, issues, and CI actions

plugins.name: quality
plugins.description: Code quality skills — refactoring, naming conventions, project structure, and Tailwind CSS audits

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security skills — OWASP audits, secret scanning, and dependency supply-chain hardening

plugins.name: tooling
plugins.description: Project tooling skills — linting/formatting setup, testing, and documentation sync

plugins.name: tartinerlabs
plugins.description: Language-agnostic agent skills for git/GitHub workflows, code quality, and project tooling, with first-class JS/TS support. Deprecated: install the workflow, quality, security, and tooling plugins instead.

plugins.name: xcode-skills
plugins.description: Apple-authored agent skills exported unchanged from Xcode 27 for Swift and Apple platform development
